apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Refactor the construction of the dynamic claims map to use intermediate variables and Map.of for immutability.
apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.human_impl: var acmeData = new HashMap<String, Object>(); acmeData.put("roles", List.of(clientId + "_user")); return Map.of("acme", acmeData);

apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add a static test claim 'foo' to the dynamic claims payload.

apps/backend-api-springboot3/src/main/ja.general_idea: Update the backend identifier in the API response to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add necessary imports for new Spring Security OAuth2 components and Actuator properties.
Inject CorsEndpointProperties into the security filter chain bean definition.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, ClientRegistrationRepository clientRegistrationRepository, CorsEndpointProperties corsEndpointProperties)

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Permit all access to the new registration endpoint /auth/register.
Refactor OAuth2 authorization code grant configuration to use the new lambda-based customizer API.
Refactor OAuth2 login user info endpoint configuration to use the new lambda-based customizer API.
Add a commented-out method for customizing token endpoint request parameters, likely for future backchannel logout support.
Define a helper method to customize the token endpoint request entity converter, adding custom parameters like client_session_state.
Register an explicit HttpSession-based AuthorizationRequestRepository bean to support dynamic user self-registration.
Register an explicit HttpSession-based OAuth2AuthorizedClientRepository bean.
Register a custom HttpSession-based OAuth2AuthorizedClientService bean, replacing the default in-memory service.
Inject ClientRegistrationRepository to enable programmatic OAuth2 authorization request resolution.
Inject AuthorizationRequestRepository to manage the state of OAuth2 authorization requests.
Implement a new endpoint to initiate anonymous user registration via Keycloak's registration flow with PKCE.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.human_impl: @GetMapping("/auth/register") public ResponseEntity<?> register(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) { ... }

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Replace deprecated SecurityContextHolder.clearContext() with HttpServletRequest.logout() for session invalidation.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Refactor JWT generation to use explicit payload maps and separate methods for different signing strategies (private key vs client secret).
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Replaced single `generateClientJwtToken` with `generateTokenSignedWithPrivateKey` and `generateTokenSignedWithClientSecret` accepting `Map<String, Object>` payloads.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Add support for OAuth 2.0 Pushed Authorization Requests (PAR) to the client authentication example.
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Added `requestPAR` method using `RestTemplate` to POST to `/protocol/openid-connect/ext/par/request`.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Correct the JWT audience claim to point to the specific token endpoint as per OIDC spec.
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Set `aud` to `issuer + "/protocol/openid-connect/token"` instead of just the issuer URL.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Reduce the JWT token lifetime for faster example execution and testing.
Include the X.509 certificate SHA-1 thumbprint in the JWT header for enhanced security verification.
Add support for signing JWTs with a client secret using HMAC-SHA256.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x equivalents to align with modern Spring Boot dependencies.
Refactor SSL socket factory creation to use the builder pattern required by HttpClient 5.x.
Refactor HTTP client connection manager creation to use the builder pattern required by HttpClient 5.x.
Adjust line breaks in method chaining for better readability.

apps/spring-boot-device-flow-client/src/.general_idea: Remove client_secret from the device authorization request to align with public client flow.
Remove offline_access scope from the device flow request.

bin/applyRealmConfig.java.general_idea: Include an additional docker-compose configuration file in the command line arguments to ensure the correct environment is loaded during provisioning.

bin/createTlsCerts.java.general_idea: Introduce constants and logic to configure the PKCS12 output filename via environment variable or command-line argument.
bin/createTlsCerts.java.human_impl: static final String P12_FILE_OPT= "--p12-file"; ... var p12File = Optional.ofNullable(System.getenv(P12_FILE_ENV))...

bin/createTlsCerts.java.general_idea: Add support for a '--client' flag that passes the p12-file and client arguments to the mkcert command.
Wrap the mkcert process execution in a try-catch block to detect missing installation and provide a user-friendly error message.
bin/createTlsCerts.java.human_impl: try { var processMkcert = pb.start(); ... } catch (Exception e) { System.out.println("Please install mkcert."); ... }

bin/envcheck.java.general_idea: Update docker compose version check command from deprecated '-v' flag to 'version' subcommand.
Add environment check for the mkcert tool to ensure it is installed.

keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.general_idea: Update calls to AccountEmail.send to include the KeycloakSession as the first argument, adapting to a changed method signature in the Keycloak API.
Add a new static method to handle account update events and send corresponding notification emails.
keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.human_impl: public static void onAccountUpdate(KeycloakSession session, RealmModel realm, UserModel user, AccountChange update) { ... }

keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.general_idea: Inline the realmDisplayName variable usage directly into the email sending calls to reduce local variable declarations.
Move the jakarta.ws.rs.core.UriInfo import to the top of the import block to maintain alphabetical ordering.
